entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Host plant for peanut bud necrosis virus

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS VIRUS
entities.description: A tospovirus that causes bud necrosis in peanuts

entities.name: S RNA
entities.description: The small RNA segment of the PBNV genome, 3,057 nucleotides in length

entities.name: NUCLEOTIDE SEQUENCE
entities.description: The complete sequence of nucleotides in the S RNA

entities.name: OPEN READING FRAMES
entities.description: Regions of the S RNA that encode proteins

entities.name: AMBISENSE CODING STRATEGY
entities.description: A coding strategy where proteins are encoded on both the viral sense and complementary strands

entities.name: NONSTRUCTURAL PROTEIN
entities.description: A 49.5 kDa protein (NSs) encoded by the S RNA

entities.name: NUCLEOCAPSID PROTEIN
entities.description: A 30.6 kDa protein (N) encoded by the S RNA

entities.name: TOSPOVIRUS
entities.description: The genus of viruses to which PBNV and related viruses belong

entities.name: SEROGROUP IV
entities.description: A classification group of tospoviruses including PBNV, WSMV, and PBNV-To

entities.name: WATERMELON SILVER MOTTLE VIRUS
entities.description: A tospovirus belonging to serogroup IV

entities.name: TOMATO ISOLATE OF PEANUT BUD NECROSIS
entities.description: A tospovirus isolate belonging to serogroup IV

entities.name: WATERMELON
entities.description: Host plant for watermelon silver mottle virus

entities.name: TOMATO
entities.description: Host plant for the tomato isolate of peanut bud necrosis
